approach.heading: A process you can hold us to.
approach.intro: We built our process around one question: what would give a buyer complete peace of mind? Here is the answer.

accountability.body: You will always have a named contact who knows your cargo, your route, and your timeline. For buyers who return each season, we reserve allocations and agree prices before the harvest opens. A relationship built to last, not just to close.
accountability.title: One person answers for every shipment.

documentation.body: We prepare every certificate and compliance document before the shipment moves. Your import team receives a clean container — not a queue of corrections to chase down at the port.
documentation.title: Paperwork ready before the vessel is booked.

grading.body: We sort and confirm every lot before packing begins — never after loading. The grade on your invoice is the grade in the bag, and the net weight is checked at the container door. Every single time.
grading.title: What the certificate says is what arrives.

labtesting.body: Every lot goes to an independent, accredited laboratory — not our own facility. You receive the original test report: moisture, pesticide levels, aflatoxins — measured openly and shared without editing.
labtesting.title: Tested by people who do not work for us.

traceability.body: Every order begins with a visit — not a phone call. We walk the fields, meet the growers, and record each lot at its source. When you ask where your spice came from, we can name the farm, the season, and the harvest.
traceability.title: It starts at the farm.

farmer.body: We pay above-market rates and open global doors for the families who grow our produce. Their stability is the foundation of our consistency.
farmer.title: The Farmer First.

partnership.body: We build partnerships, not transactions — with farmers behind us and buyers who trust us. Your trust is something we earn every shipment, not just the first.
partnership.title: Built for the Long Run.

quality.body: Every batch is tested, documented, and verified at the farm, at processing, and before dispatch. If it does not meet our standard, it does not leave.
quality.title: No Shortcuts, Ever.

origin.body: BACA was built on a single conviction: that the quality of what reaches a buyer is inseparable from the honesty of every step before it. We hold direct relationships with farming families across Kerala, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh — offering fair pricing, transparent processes, and access to global markets that were once out of reach.
origin.heading: India's finest origins,
origin.quote: Because when the farmer thrives, everything that reaches you is better for it.

farmer.body: We pay above-market rates and open global doors for the families who grow our produce. Their stability is the foundation of our consistency.
farmer.title: The Farmer First.

partnership.body: We build partnerships, not transactions — with farmers behind us and buyers who trust us. Your trust is something we earn every shipment, not just the first.
partnership.title: Built for the Long Run.

quality.body: Every batch is tested, documented, and verified at the farm, at processing, and before dispatch. If it does not meet our standard, it does not leave.
quality.title: No Shortcuts, Ever.

mission.body: To connect India's finest growing regions with the world's most discerning buyers — through traceable sourcing, honest quality, and a price that truly reflects the work behind every shipment.
mission.title: Mission

vision.body: To be India's most trusted commodity exporter — known not for volume, but for the consistency that brings the same buyers back, season after season.
vision.title: Vision

featuredInsights.heading: Notes from the spice and commodities trade.

footer.description: A modern Indian export house for spices, nuts, and fruits.

arjun.name: Arjun Menon
arjun.note: My father used to say — never sell what you would not serve at your own table. That has been our rule since the very first shipment. I have walked the same fields in Kerala for over two decades, and I still visit before we commit to a grower. You cannot build real trust from a desk.

priya.name: Priya Menon
priya.note: In this trade, a delayed document is a broken promise. When a container sits at port waiting on paperwork, it is not a logistics problem — it is a trust problem. Everything we built around documentation came from watching that happen once, and deciding it would never happen to our buyers.

rajan.name: Rajan Nair
rajan.note: India grows some of the finest spices in the world. The farmers I work with have spent their whole lives perfecting what they do. Our job is simply to make sure that effort reaches the buyer intact — honestly graded, honestly packed, honestly shipped. Nothing more, nothing less.

galleryPage.empty: Photos are being added. Please check back soon.
galleryPage.heading: The work, the people, the soil.
galleryPage.intro: Inside our sourcing, grading and shipping — at origin in India and on to the world.

globalPresence.body: BACA ships to importers, distributors and food manufacturers across North America, Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia and Africa — on documented, on-time contracts.
globalPresence.heading: From Indian ports to five continents.

hero.body: A new generation of Indian export — built on traceable sourcing, rigorous quality, and partnerships that move commodities reliably, container after container.
hero.eyebrow: Premium Spices & Agri Produce · Trusted Indian Origins
hero.headline:
Quality.

Trust.

Delivered.

manifesto.body: Two decades at origin in Kerala, Gujarat and Andhra — buying from the same farming families season after season, grading at source, and moving full containers to buyers across 37 countries.
manifesto.headline: We connect Indian growers with the world's most demanding kitchens — sourcing with intention, and shipping with precision.
manifesto.imageAlt: Weathered hands slicing fresh turmeric at source in India — grading raw spice the way BACA's farming families have for generations

metadata.description: BACA is a modern Indian export house — traceable sourcing of spices, nuts, and fruits, rigorous quality, and reliable global shipments. ISO 22000, HACCP & FSSAI certified.
metadata.title: BACA — Indian Spice, Nut & Fruit Exporter

productPreview.heading: Sourced at origin, graded for export.

productsPage.empty: Our catalogue is being updated. Please check back soon.
productsPage.heading: Everything we export, sourced at origin.
productsPage.intro: Spices, nuts and fruits — graded, documented, and shipped to buyers across 37 countries.

founders.heading: The people behind BACA.
founders.intro: BACA is led by two siblings who built the business out of two decades on the ground in India's spice trade.

founder1.bio: Two decades buying directly from cooperatives across Kerala and Andhra. Oversees grower relationships, origin grading, and lab-testing programmes for every shipment.

founder2.bio: Manages export documentation, forwarder relationships and the buyer-facing trade desk. Previously ran the logistics arm of a Mumbai-based commodity trading house.

profilePage.heading: A family-led Indian export house, built for the long view.

howWeWork.heading: From soil to shipping, in four disciplined steps.
howWeWork.intro: Every container that leaves our door has earned its place through the same sequence.

document.body: Phytosanitary certificates, HS codes, Incoterms and origin paperwork are issued before the vessel sails so customs clearance never holds up a shipment at the destination port.
document.title: Document

grade.body: Every lot is hand-sorted, lab-tested for moisture, pesticide residue and aflatoxins, and documented to ISO 22000 and HACCP protocols before it ever sees a container.
grade.title: Grade

ship.body: Packed at origin and moved as documented full-container loads with contracted forwarders — same vessels, same lanes, same arrival windows your supply chain can plan around.
ship.title: Ship

source.body: We buy direct from grower cooperatives in the regions each crop is native to — cardamom from Kerala, chilli from Guntur, pepper from Malabar — for full traceability from field to forwarder.
source.title: Source

profilePage.intro: Two decades at origin in Kerala, Gujarat and Andhra — buying from the same grower families season after season, grading at source, and moving full containers to buyers in 37 countries.

visionMission.heading: What we're working toward — and how.

mission.body: Connect smallholder farmers in India to discerning buyers abroad through rigorous quality control, transparent paperwork, and shipping relationships measured in years.
mission.title: Mission

vision.body: A world where Indian agriculture trades on the same footing as any premium origin — traceable, properly documented, and priced for the work it represents at the farm gate.
vision.title: Vision

whoWeAre.body: BACA is a modern Indian export house specialising in spices, nuts and fruits. We work directly with farming families in India's traditional growing regions, grade and lab-test every lot at origin, and ship documented full-container loads to importers, distributors and retailers worldwide. The team has worked across origin, grading and logistics for over two decades; the company is the formalisation of that experience under one brand.
whoWeAre.heading: An export house built on relationships.

whyBaca.heading: Four reasons importers stay with us.
whyBaca.intro: Procurement teams choose BACA when they want to stop firefighting and start planning.

logistics.body: Contracted vessel slots and seasoned forwarders mean your container arrives in the window we quoted — not 'sometime that month.'
logistics.title: Reliable logistics

partnership.body: Fixed-price contracts and crop reservations for repeat buyers. We measure relationships in growing seasons, not single PO numbers.
partnership.title: Long-term partnership

quality.body: ISO 22000 + HACCP-grade controls at origin: moisture, pesticide residue, aflatoxin and microbiological tests, not random sampling at port.
quality.title: Lab-tested quality

traceability.body: Every lot is tied to a specific grower cooperative, harvest window and lab result — auditable from your warehouse back to the field.
traceability.title: Full traceability

pullQuote.imageAlt: Portrait of the Managing Director of BACA
pullQuote.name: Arvind Menon
pullQuote.quote: We don't trade shipments — we hold contracts. The same buyers come back season after season because the grade in the container matches the grade on the certificate, every single time.
pullQuote.title: Managing Director, BACA

whatWeOffer.body: Sourced from India's finest growing regions — tested, certified, and shipped with full traceability.
whatWeOffer.heading: Our Product Range

certifications.heading: Certified for global trade.
certifications.intro: Every shipment leaves with its credentials in order.

apeda.name: APEDA
apeda.sub: Agri & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority.

fssai.name: FSSAI
fssai.sub: Mandatory food-safety clearance for all Indian food exports.

haccp.name: HACCP
haccp.sub: Systematic preventive approach to biological and chemical hazards.

halal.name: Halal
halal.sub: Enables trade to markets requiring halal-certified product.

iso22000.name: ISO 22000
iso22000.sub: International standard for food-safety management systems.

spicesBoard.name: Spices Board
spicesBoard.sub: Government registration for certified spice exporters.
